name: Zesty Sloppy Joes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan or Dutch oven over medium heat, brown the beef and onion.
2. Add green pepper. Cook and stir for 5 minutes; drain excess fat if needed.
3. Add the remaining ingredients: tomato soup, tomato sauce, brown sugar, ketchup, Worcestershire sauce, prepared mustard, dry mustard, chili powder, and garlic salt.
4. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and cover. Simmer for 1 hour, stirring occasionally until all flavors are well combined.
5. Serve the mixture on buns.
